title: Neither `INVITE_ORG` nor `REGISTER` event is triggered when a new user is invited to an organization
labels: kind/bug, help wanted, team/core-iam, status/auto-expire, status/auto-bump, priority/normal, area/organizations
what_to_do: Locate the organization invitation flow, likely in `OrganizationResource` or `OrganizationInviteResource` within the `services` module. Inject the `EventBuilder` and ensure `event(EventType.INVITE_ORG)` or `REGISTER` is explicitly called and fired (`event.success()`) when a new user is successfully invited. Add or update integration tests in the `testsuite` module to verify the event is emitted.
skill_tags: Java, Keycloak SPI, Event-Driven Architecture, JUnit
